options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Build Response').first().json.ok, call_id: $('Build Response').first().json.call_id, event_id: $('Build Response').first().json.event_id || null, error: $('Build Response').first().json.error || null }) }}

nodes.name: Finalize Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. POST /webhook/call/finalized body: { call_id, agent_id, lead_id, duration_seconds }. Fired by Vapi (or operator) when a call ends. Runs Claude Sonnet full analysis + writes call_event_log + optional manager coaching email.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929', max_tokens: 2000, temperature: 0.3, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude Sonnet Analyze
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind 'Anthropic API' credential. Falls back to heuristic-only analysis if Claude unbound.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_call_id: $json.call_id, p_overall_sentiment: $json.analysis.overall_sentiment, p_trajectory: $json.analysis.sentiment_trajectory, p_key_objections: $json.analysis.key_objections, p_closing_signals: $json.analysis.closing_signals_detected, p_buy_signals: $json.analysis.buy_signals_detected, p_outcome: $json.analysis.call_outcome_prediction, p_quality: $json.analysis.transcript_quality, p_analysis: $json.analysis }) }}
